39:46.arabic: قُلِ ٱللَّهُمَّ فَاطِرَ ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ عَـٰلِمَ ٱلْغَيْبِ وَٱلشَّهَـٰدَةِ أَنتَ تَحْكُمُ بَيْنَ عِبَادِكَ
39:46.english: Say: O Allah, Creator of the heavens and earth, Knower of the unseen and the witnessed — You judge between Your servants.
39:46.score_notes: The bridge verse par excellence. Contains both Allahumma (L1 recall) and al-shahada (L2 — the seen as opposite of the unseen).

lesson_use.arabic: قُلِ اللَّهُمَّ فَاطِرَ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضِ عَالِمَ الْغَيْبِ وَالشَّهَادَةِ
lesson_use.english: Say: O Allah, Creator of the heavens and earth, Knower of the unseen and the witnessed
lesson_use.notes: The bridge verse. Contains Allahumma (L1 recall) AND al-shahada (L2 — the seen/witnessed as opposite of the unseen). Single verse activates both lessons.
